title: geox_claim_seal (symbolic hardening)
description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §3 — additive symbolic hardening for `geox_claim_seal`. This schema is APPENDED to the existing geox schema for `geox_claim_seal` and does not rewrite any pre-existing field. Spec: /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §3. Note: Geological sealing, trap seal, and constitutional SEAL must not be confused.

seal_disambiguation.description: §3.I — MANDATORY seal disambiguation. Ties to Rule Zero.

symbolic_assessment.description: MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1 §8 — Every geox_claim_seal output should carry this symbolic_assessment block so callers can distinguish literal from symbolic, identify authority, and preserve reversibility. See /root/arifOS/forge_work/MCP-SYMBOLIC-HARDEN-v1.md §8.
